category_sources: Official project site says Rootkit Hunter is the official project home and provides runtime/configuration support resources.
source_facts.description identifies rkhunter as Rootkit hunter.
display_name_sources: Official project site title is The Rootkit Hunter project.
source_facts.name gives rkhunter as the package name.
docs_sources: Official project site directs users to the README and FAQ for running and troubleshooting Rootkit Hunter.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge Code area exposes the rkhunter source-control tree.
tags_sources: Official project site provides bug, support, README, FAQ, and mailing-list resources for the security scanner.
